case_title: AUSHANTEE DORTON VS. DIARRAS MANUEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-30-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
CORRESPONDENCE RECD FROM CT CORPORATION STATING THEY ARE NOT THE AGENT OF SERVICE FOR KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF DORTON, AUSHANTEE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2022 BY VISITING JUDGE SYLVIA L. HUSING. PLAINTIFF AUSHANTEE DORTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIARRAS MANUEL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF AUSHANTEE DORTON REQUESTS TO DISMISS DEFENDANT KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE TO MOVE FORWARD WITH HEARING. COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS DEFENDANT KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED JUN-09-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, DIARRAS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, DIARRAS

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DORTON, AUSHANTEE AS TO DEFENDANT MANUEL, DIARRAS KEMPER INDEPENDENT INSURANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-13-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-18-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF AUSHANTEE DORTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIARRAS MANUEL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KEMPER INPENDANCE INSURANCE IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON KEMPER INDEPENCE INSURANCE. NO FURTHER ON SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT DIARRAS MANUEL NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DORTON, AUSHANTEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANUEL, DIARRAS $5,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,360.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
